assessment.note: She names a repeatable clarity gap: waiting until analysis is complete delays early alignment with non-technical partners. [THREAD-DEFERRED] 'wait until analysis is complete before socializing direction' is a concrete cause thread, but drill cap forces stage advance.

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?
new_queue.description: Tests whether they can name their own gaps before the manager does.

new_queue.label: Signal driver
new_queue.name: What's making it harder to raise your signal with stakeholders right now?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether the constraint is habit, context, or channel choice.

new_queue.label: Alignment move
new_queue.name: What's the first concrete move you want to make on cross-team alignment before we next meet?
new_queue.description: Ends on a specific action tied to friction reduction and follow-through.
